design.base: red-pink fox girl with blue star-like eyes, fox ears, black bows, large red fox tail, pink cropped hoodie, black inner top, black high-waisted shorts, and black boots
design.portrait: Use the finalized splash-art portrait as-is; transparency processing is deferred.
design.hair: Back hair ends use a moderated outward-flip silhouette.
design.eyes: Blue eyes with light-aqua star detail near the pupil.

weapon.concept: Beniko uses a game controller as a magical casting medium.

normal_attack.description: Fires a blue star-shaped energy projectile.
normal_attack.selected_design: second projectile concept recolored to a blue/cyan palette

idle.source: Beniko idle variant 2 with centered frames, full tail visible, body parts restored, top/hair-tail holes fixed, eyes restored.
idle.alignment: Rin-like shared canvas, centered body, stable feet/body center, no baked shadow

notes: Beniko is the second character after Rin.
Normal attack is controller-cast blue star magic, not firearm-based.
Use transparent PNG workflow for sprites; shadows are game-side only.
